arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lex bot.

checksum.description: A checksum that helps identify the version of the Lex bot.

child_directed.description: Indicates whether the Lex bot is directed towards children.

created_date.description: The date when the Lex bot was created.

description.description: A brief description of the Lex bot.

detect_sentiment.description: Indicates if the Lex bot has sentiment detection enabled.

enable_model_improvements.description: Indicates if the Lex bot's model improvements are enabled.

failure_reason.description: The reason for any failure in building the Lex bot.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Lex bot.

idle_session_ttl_in_seconds.description: The time-to-live (TTL) for a session in seconds when the Lex bot is idle.

last_updated_date.description: The date when the Lex bot was last updated.

locale.description: The language locale of the Lex bot.

nlu_intent_confidence_threshold.description: The confidence threshold for the NLU intent in the Lex bot.

status.description: The current status of the Lex bot.

voice_id.description: The identifier for the voice used by the Lex bot.
